message:
feat(ufunc,conformance): align unique() NaN dedup and signed-zero semantics with NumPy, fix oracle NaN propagation for min/max reductions

Fixes unique() to collapse multiple NaN values into one (matching NumPy),
adds NaN-aware min/max helpers to the Python oracle fallback, hardens
JSON serialization of non-finite floats in differential fixtures, and
closes several edge-case parity issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
